purpose: Safe DayZ performance, accessibility, private-server, and connection-health guidance.

performance_optimization.title: Performance Optimization
performance_optimization.description: Improve DayZ client performance without unsafe game manipulation.

tips.title: Graphics Settings Baseline
tips.description: Tune GPU/CPU-heavy settings for smoother frame pacing.
tips.content: Start with object detail, terrain detail, shadows, post-processing, and view distance. Change one setting at a time and record FPS, frame-time consistency, and subjective smoothness.

tips.title: Windows Gaming Baseline
tips.description: Reduce background noise before diagnosing network issues.
tips.content: Use Game Mode, close launchers/overlays you do not need, keep GPU drivers current, and avoid changing advanced network registry settings unless you can roll them back.

tips.title: Storage and Memory Check
tips.description: Reduce stutter caused by disk pressure or memory pressure.
tips.content: Prefer SSD storage, keep free disk space available, close memory-heavy applications, and test with the same server/mod set before and after changes.

connection_health.title: Connection Health
connection_health.description: Diagnose latency, jitter, loss, firewall, and route issues.

tips.title: Record a Clean Baseline
tips.content: Run Network Health, capture latency/jitter/loss observations, note wired vs Wi-Fi, and record the server region/time of day. Baselines make later changes meaningful.

tips.title: Prefer Wired for Troubleshooting
tips.description: Remove Wi-Fi variability when isolating a problem.
tips.content: If possible, repeat the same test over Ethernet. If the issue disappears, inspect Wi-Fi signal quality, channel congestion, power management, and router placement.

tips.title: Use Bounded Packet Captures
tips.content: Use DupeZ's guided Pktmon planning/capture flow with a required port filter, short duration, and explicit privacy review before sharing any files.

private_server_operations.title: Private Server Operations
private_server_operations.description: Operate and troubleshoot servers you own or administer.

tips.title: Server Change Log
tips.description: Track changes before blaming the network.
tips.content: Record mod updates, config changes, restart times, player-count changes, and host maintenance windows. Many connection reports line up with server-side changes.

tips.title: Mod Load Testing
tips.description: Isolate mod-related performance and connection issues.
tips.content: Test a minimal mod set, then add groups back gradually. Keep notes on join time, disconnects, server FPS, and client logs.

accessibility_and_controls.title: Accessibility and Controls
accessibility_and_controls.description: Legitimate controller and UI workflow assistance.

tips.title: Controller Comfort Macros
tips.description: Use scripts only for accessibility or repetitive local workflows allowed by your server rules.
tips.content: Keep controller scripts transparent, avoid competitive advantage, and verify private-server rules before using automation.
